lines.gurmukhi: ਮਿਲੇ ਪ੍ਰਤਖਿ ਗੁਸਾਈਆ ਧੰਨਾ ਵਡਭਾਗਾ ॥੪॥੨॥
lines.translit: mile pratakh gusaaeea dhanaa vaddabhaagaa |4|2|
lines.english: The Lord of the Universe met him personally; Dhanna was so very blessed. ||4||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹ ਬਿਧਿ ਸੁਨਿ ਕੈ ਜਾਟਰੋ ਉਠਿ ਭਗਤੀ ਲਾਗਾ ॥
lines.translit: eih bidh sun kai jaattaro utth bhagatee laagaa |
lines.english: Hearing this, Dhanna the Jaat applied himself to devotional worship.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੇ ਚਿਤ ਚੇਤਸਿ ਕੀ ਨ ਦਯਾਲ ਦਮੋਦਰ ਬਿਬਹਿ ਨ ਜਾਨਸਿ ਕੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: re chit chetas kee na dayaal damodar bibeh na jaanas koee |
lines.english: O my consciousness, why don't you remain conscious of the Merciful Lord? How can you recognize any other?

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇ ਧਾਵਹਿ ਬ੍ਰਹਮੰਡ ਖੰਡ ਕਉ ਕਰਤਾ ਕਰੈ ਸੁ ਹੋਈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: je dhaaveh brahamandd khandd kau karataa karai su hoee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: You may run around the whole universe, but that alone happens which the Creator Lord does. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨਨੀ ਕੇਰੇ ਉਦਰ ਉਦਕ ਮਹਿ ਪਿੰਡੁ ਕੀਆ ਦਸ ਦੁਆਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: jananee kere udar udak meh pindd keea das duaaraa |
lines.english: In the water of the mother's womb, He fashioned the body with ten gates.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੇਇ ਅਹਾਰੁ ਅਗਨਿ ਮਹਿ ਰਾਖੈ ਐਸਾ ਖਸਮੁ ਹਮਾਰਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: dee ahaar agan meh raakhai aisaa khasam hamaaraa |1|
lines.english: He gives it sustenance, and preserves it in fire - such is my Lord and Master. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੁੰਮੀ ਜਲ ਮਾਹਿ ਤਨ ਤਿਸੁ ਬਾਹਰਿ ਪੰਖ ਖੀਰੁ ਤਿਨ ਨਾਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: kunmee jal maeh tan tis baahar pankh kheer tin naahee |
lines.english: The mother turtle is in the water, and her babies are out of the water. She has no wings to protect them, and no milk to feed them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਖਣਿ ਕੀਟੁ ਗੁਪਤੁ ਹੋਇ ਰਹਤਾ ਤਾ ਚੋ ਮਾਰਗੁ ਨਾਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: paakhan keett gupat hoe rahataa taa cho maarag naahee |
lines.english: The worm lies hidden under the stone - there is no way for him to escape.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਰਨ ਪਰਮਾਨੰਦ ਮਨੋਹਰ ਸਮਝਿ ਦੇਖੁ ਮਨ ਮਾਹੀ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: pooran paramaanand manohar samajh dekh man maahee |2|
lines.english: The Perfect Lord, the embodiment of supreme bliss, the Fascinating Lord takes care of them. See this, and understand it in your mind||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹੈ ਧੰਨਾ ਪੂਰਨ ਤਾਹੂ ਕੋ ਮਤ ਰੇ ਜੀਅ ਡਰਾਂਹੀ ॥੩॥੩॥
lines.translit: kahai dhanaa pooran taahoo ko mat re jeea ddaraanhee |3|3|
lines.english: Says Dhanna, the Perfect Lord takes care of him. Fear not, O my soul. ||3||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸਾ ਸੇਖ ਫਰੀਦ ਜੀਉ ਕੀ ਬਾਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: aasaa sekh fareed jeeo kee baanee |
lines.english: Aasaa, The Word Of Shaykh Fareed Jee:

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਿਲਹੁ ਮੁਹਬਤਿ ਜਿੰਨੑ ਸੇਈ ਸਚਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: dilahu muhabat jina seee sachiaa |
lines.english: They alone are true, whose love for God is deep and heart-felt.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨੑ ਮਨਿ ਹੋਰੁ ਮੁਖਿ ਹੋਰੁ ਸਿ ਕਾਂਢੇ ਕਚਿਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jina man hor mukh hor si kaandte kachiaa |1|
lines.english: Those who have one thing in their heart, and something else in their mouth, are judged to be false. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਤੇ ਇਸਕ ਖੁਦਾਇ ਰੰਗਿ ਦੀਦਾਰ ਕੇ ॥
lines.translit: rate isak khudaae rang deedaar ke |
lines.english: Those who are imbued with love for the Lord, are delighted by His Vision.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਿਸਰਿਆ ਜਿਨੑ ਨਾਮੁ ਤੇ ਭੁਇ ਭਾਰੁ ਥੀਏ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: visariaa jina naam te bhue bhaar thee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Those who forget the Naam, the Name of the Lord, are a burden on the earth. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਿ ਲੀਏ ਲੜਿ ਲਾਇ ਦਰਿ ਦਰਵੇਸ ਸੇ ॥
lines.translit: aap lee larr laae dar daraves se |
lines.english: Those whom the Lord attaches to the hem of His robe, are the true dervishes at His Door.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨ ਧੰਨੁ ਜਣੇਦੀ ਮਾਉ ਆਏ ਸਫਲੁ ਸੇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: tin dhan janedee maau aae safal se |2|
lines.english: Blessed are the mothers who gave birth to them, and fruitful is their coming into the world. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਰਵਦਗਾਰ ਅਪਾਰ ਅਗਮ ਬੇਅੰਤ ਤੂ ॥
lines.translit: paravadagaar apaar agam beant too |
lines.english: O Lord, Sustainer and Cherisher, You are infinite, unfathomable and endless.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਾ ਪਛਾਤਾ ਸਚੁ ਚੁੰਮਾ ਪੈਰ ਮੂੰ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: jinaa pachhaataa sach chunmaa pair moon |3|
lines.english: Those who recognize the True Lord - I kiss their feet. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇਖ ਫਰੀਦੈ ਖੈਰੁ ਦੀਜੈ ਬੰਦਗੀ ॥੪॥੧॥
lines.translit: sekh fareedai khair deejai bandagee |4|1|
lines.english: Please, bless Shaykh Fareed with the bounty of Your meditative worship. ||4||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੇਰੀ ਪਨਹ ਖੁਦਾਇ ਤੂ ਬਖਸੰਦਗੀ ॥
lines.translit: teree panah khudaae too bakhasandagee |
lines.english: I seek Your Protection - You are the Forgiving Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬੋਲੈ ਸੇਖ ਫਰੀਦੁ ਪਿਆਰੇ ਅਲਹ ਲਗੇ ॥
lines.translit: bolai sekh fareed piaare alah lage |
lines.english: Says Shaykh Fareed, O my dear friend, attach yourself to the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਜੁ ਮਿਲਾਵਾ ਸੇਖ ਫਰੀਦ ਟਾਕਿਮ ਕੂੰਜੜੀਆ ਮਨਹੁ ਮਚਿੰਦੜੀਆ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: aaj milaavaa sekh fareed ttaakim koonjarreea manahu machindarreea |1| rahaau |
lines.english: You can meet the Lord today, O Shaykh Fareed, if you restrain your bird-like desires which keep your mind in turmoil. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸਾ ॥
lines.translit: aasaa |
lines.english: Aasaa:

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹੁ ਤਨੁ ਹੋਸੀ ਖਾਕ ਨਿਮਾਣੀ ਗੋਰ ਘਰੇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: eihu tan hosee khaak nimaanee gor ghare |1|
lines.english: This body shall turn to dust, and its home shall be a neglected graveyard. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇ ਜਾਣਾ ਮਰਿ ਜਾਈਐ ਘੁਮਿ ਨ ਆਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: je jaanaa mar jaaeeai ghum na aaeeai |
lines.english: If I had known that I was to die, and not return again,

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਗੁਰੁ ਦਸੈ ਵਾਟ ਮੁਰੀਦਾ ਜੋਲੀਐ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: jo gur dasai vaatt mureedaa joleeai |3|
lines.english: The disciple ought to travel the route, pointed out by the Guru. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬੋਲੀਐ ਸਚੁ ਧਰਮੁ ਝੂਠੁ ਨ ਬੋਲੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: boleeai sach dharam jhootth na boleeai |
lines.english: So speak the Truth, in righteousness, and do not speak falsehood.

lines.gurmukhi: ਝੂਠੀ ਦੁਨੀਆ ਲਗਿ ਨ ਆਪੁ ਵਞਾਈਐ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jhootthee duneea lag na aap vayaaeeai |2|
lines.english: I would not have ruined myself by clinging to the world of falsehood. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਛੈਲ ਲੰਘੰਦੇ ਪਾਰਿ ਗੋਰੀ ਮਨੁ ਧੀਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: chhail langhande paar goree man dheeriaa |
lines.english: Seeing the youths being carried across, the hearts of the beautiful young soul-brides are encouraged.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੰਚਨ ਵੰਨੇ ਪਾਸੇ ਕਲਵਤਿ ਚੀਰਿਆ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: kanchan vane paase kalavat cheeriaa |4|
lines.english: Those who side with the glitter of gold, are cut down with a saw. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਆਸਣਿ ਹਮ ਬੈਠੇ ਕੇਤੇ ਬੈਸਿ ਗਇਆ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: jis aasan ham baitthe kete bais geaa |5|
lines.english: That seat, upon which we now sit - many others sat on it and have since departed. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇਖ ਹੈਯਾਤੀ ਜਗਿ ਨ ਕੋਈ ਥਿਰੁ ਰਹਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: sekh haiyaatee jag na koee thir rahiaa |
lines.english: O Shaykh, no one's life is permanent in this world.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਤਿਕ ਕੂੰਜਾਂ ਚੇਤਿ ਡਉ ਸਾਵਣਿ ਬਿਜੁਲੀਆਂ ॥
lines.translit: katik koonjaan chet ddau saavan bijuleean |
lines.english: As the swallows appear in the month of Katik, forest fires in the month of Chayt, and lightning in Saawan,

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੀਆਲੇ ਸੋਹੰਦੀਆਂ ਪਿਰ ਗਲਿ ਬਾਹੜੀਆਂ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: seeaale sohandeean pir gal baaharreean |6|
lines.english: and as the bride's arms adorn her husband's neck in winter;||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਲੇ ਚਲਣਹਾਰ ਵਿਚਾਰਾ ਲੇਇ ਮਨੋ ॥
lines.translit: chale chalanahaar vichaaraa lee mano |
lines.english: Just so, the transitory human bodies pass away. Reflect upon this in your mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਮੀ ਪੁਛੈ ਅਸਮਾਨ ਫਰੀਦਾ ਖੇਵਟ ਕਿੰਨਿ ਗਏ ॥
lines.translit: jimee puchhai asamaan fareedaa khevatt kin ge |
lines.english: O Fareed, the earth asks the sky, "Where have the boatmen gone?"

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੰਢੇਦਿਆਂ ਛਿਅ ਮਾਹ ਤੁੜੰਦਿਆ ਹਿਕੁ ਖਿਨੋ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: gandtediaan chhia maah turrandiaa hik khino |7|
lines.english: It takes six months to form the body, but it breaks in an instant. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾਲਣ ਗੋਰਾਂ ਨਾਲਿ ਉਲਾਮੇ ਜੀਅ ਸਹੇ ॥੮॥੨॥
lines.translit: jaalan goraan naal ulaame jeea sahe |8|2|
lines.english: Some have been cremated, and some lie in their graves; their souls are suffering rebukes. ||8||2||
